Cgv.title: Terms and conditions of sale
Cgv.objText: These general terms and conditions of sale govern the contractual relationship between NEONZART and its customers for the purchase of LED neon signs, ready-to-buy or custom-made.
Cgv.ordersText: Any custom order is subject to prior validation of the design by the customer via the online configurator. No production begins before explicit confirmation of the final rendering.
Cgv.paymentText: No online payment is required to place an order. For catalog signs, payment is made in full, in cash, on delivery. For custom signs, a 30% deposit of the total price must be paid before production starts; the remaining balance is paid on delivery.
Cgv.deliveryText: Delivery times are given for information purposes and may vary depending on destination and manufacturing complexity.
Cgv.withdrawalText: In accordance with applicable regulations, the right of withdrawal does not apply to custom-made products.

items.question: What is the manufacturing time for a custom sign?
items.answer: Allow generally 7 to 14 business days between design validation and shipping.

items.question: What is the maximum size for a custom sign?
items.answer: Custom signs are limited to 90cm in width and 90cm in height.

items.question: What happens if my design has collisions?
items.answer: The configurator automatically detects areas where two neon tubes would be too close and suggests adjustments before you confirm the order.

items.question: Do you deliver outside Algeria?
items.answer: Yes, international delivery is available via carrier; delivery times vary by destination.
